titlestmt.titleproper: John Clair Miller image collection of twentieth-century architecture in Iceland.8579

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-08-16 18:25:54 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: John Clair Miller image collection of twentieth-century architecture in Iceland.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: The John Clair Miller Image Collection of Twentieth-Century Architecture in Iceland contains photographic images made by Professor Miller of more than a dozen architectural installations in Reykjavík and in other locations in Iceland (also some in Finland). Architectural projects include private residences, lighthouses, places of worship, and government buildings.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: John Clair Miller Image Collection of Twentieth-Century Architecture in Iceland, #8579. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

originalsloc.head: Existence and Location of Originals
originalsloc.p: Original 35mm slides retained by John Clair Miller.
